message:
fix(node): saturating_add for valid_count in lease_coordinator and threshold_sig

Both files had `valid_count += 1` for quorum/threshold signature counting
without overflow protection. Replaced with `valid_count.saturating_add(1)`
to match codebase hardening pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
